reason: Response B exhibits the warm, conversational, emotionally supportive tone that is characteristic of Claude Haiku — it checks in personally, uses empathetic language ("I care about you"), and structures the message as a genuine friend-to-friend note. Response A reads more like polished prose or an essay, with aphoristic phrasing ("Your body keeps score," "Sleep is not laziness") that feels more like a larger model's literary style. Haiku tends toward accessible, direct warmth rather than rhetorical flourish.
